title: SSHB Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 13 House Staff Posts
description: Suri Sadar Hospital, Birbhum, has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 13 House Staff Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the SSHB Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are looking for more, here is a list...
